text.title: Acceptance Criteria Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the AC about user-facing behaviour or system constraint?

example.trace: shape=behaviour → BDD with 4 AC tied to spec.md#auth-reset + tests/auth_reset.spec.ts.
